name: demo
label: Quick Demo — 10 observations
description: Minimal dataset to see the neuron tree form instantly.
observations: Alice is the CEO of Acme Corp
Bob is the CTO of Acme Corp
Acme Corp builds automation software called AutoFlow
Bob has a PhD from MIT
AutoFlow processes two million tasks per day
Acme Corp raised 40 million dollars from Sequoia
Alice prefers written communication over meetings
Bob insists on code reviews for every pull request
Acme Corp was founded in San Francisco in 2018
